description_long: This object is a vintage mechanical typewriter with a robust, boxy frame and ornate gold detailing along its black metal body. The front features a classic QWERTY keyboard with round, white keys set in black rims, each key raised above the surface for tactile feedback. The top section houses a large cylindrical platen and a paper feed mechanism, with visible levers and knobs for manual operation. The rear side displays the word 'Typewriter' in gold, and the sides reveal intricate mechanical linkages and gears. The typewriter sits on four sturdy legs, elevating it above the surface and giving it a substantial, industrial presence. Its overall appearance suggests a historical artifact, likely from the early 20th century, designed for heavy-duty use in offices or public spaces.
description: A vintage black and gold mechanical typewriter with round white keys and ornate detailing, featuring a prominent cylindrical platen and robust metal frame. The design is intricate and industrial, evoking early 20th-century craftsmanship.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full QWERTY keyboard, ornate gold detailing, and the typewriter's main operational area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cylindrical platen, side gears, and the depth of the keyboard layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'Typewriter' label in gold and the back structure of the platen and frame.
description_view_3: Right side view revealing the mechanical linkages, side gears, and the extended keyboard.
